steps.title: See the old belief
steps.content: The underlined portion gives the previous understanding: Denisovans were thought to live only in high-altitude, cold-climate regions of Russia and China. The word "but" then introduces the Laos tooth as a broader-environment finding involving low altitudes and warm climates.

steps.title: Reject false functions
steps.content: A says the sentence dismisses the earlier research, but it supplies background. B says it defines a term, though no definition appears. C says it gives the research goal, but it gives prior context instead. The answer is D.
